title: Bare Bones x Default Dark Mode
description: Adds dark mode while still keeping the Bare Bones feel!
body:
![Bare Bones x Default Dark Mode logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c6cb9e93d872b07789c2b29adf1b5f57db13f57.png)
#
# Description
This resource pack adds [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/project/rox3U8B6) textures to [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/project/6SLU7tS5) resource pack. Put over the Default Dark Mode and Bare Bones resource pack. This pack was created so I could get a green hover effect on buttons.
